title: Design: GSAP scroll-triggered animation spec — cards fade in, numbers count up, sections slide in
description: Add GSAP scroll-triggered animations throughout the homepage. Cards fade in on scroll, stat numbers count up, sections slide in. Must be lightweight — no heavy 3D libraries. Mobile performance is critical (most traffic will be phone users). Spec which elements get which animations, easing curves, durations, stagger timing.

comment.body:
GSAP scroll animation spec complete. 4 animation types: section headlines (fade up), framework cards (staggered fade), how-it-works steps (left slide), comparison cards (fade up). All mobile-safe (opacity+transform only, stagger ≤0.15s, duration ≤0.6s). Count-up spec included for future stat numbers. Full reduced-motion guard.

Plan: [TESA-162#document-plan](/TESA/issues/TESA-162#document-plan)
